STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WINE_FOX_STRIKE.title: Strike
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WINE_FOX_DEFEND.title: Defend
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BASIC_MINE.title: Basic Mining
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONE_PICKAXE.title: Stone Pickaxe
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONE_PICKAXE.descrip:
{IfUpgraded:show:Immediately gain {WoodPower:diff()} [gold]Plank[/gold] and {StonePower:diff()} [gold]Cobblestone[/gold].
|}At the start of each turn, gain [blue]{Digging:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Plank[/gold] and [blue]{Digging:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Cobblestone[/gold].{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BASIC_CRAFT.title: Basic Crafting
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FULL_ATTACK.title: Full Barrage
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FULL_ATTACK.descripti:
Spend ALL [gold]Materials[/gold].
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to a chosen enemy.
+{ExtraDamage:diff()} damage for each Material spent.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MINING_GEMS.title: Mining Gems
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PLANT_TREES.title: Plant Trees
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PLANT_TREES.descripti: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. At the start of next turn, gain [blue]{Plant:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Plank[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STEAM_ENGINE.title: Steam Engine
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STEAM_ENGINE.descript: At the start of each turn, gain {Steam:diff()} [gold]Stress[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONE_SWORD.title: Stone Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_ARMOR.title: Iron Armor
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_ARMOR.descriptio:
Gain {Armor:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
[gold]Plating[/gold] is not reduced at the start of your turn.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PRESS_W_TO_THINK_CHOO: Choose a card to add to your hand
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MECHANICAL_DRILL.desc: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits} times. Gain {Iron:diff()} [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold]. If [gold]Stress[/gold] was spent, refund {Energy:energyIcons()}.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WOODEN_SWORD.title: Wooden Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_PICKAXE.title: Iron Pickaxe
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_PICKAXE.descript: For the next {Times:diff()} times you gain resources, gain {IfUpgraded:show:4|3} additional [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold].{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_SWORD.title: Diamond Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_SWORD.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Each turn, your first {Echoes:diff()} [gold]Attack[/gold] cards are played an additional time.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MECHANICAL_SAW.title: Mechanical Saw
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MECHANICAL_SAW.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Spend 1 [gold]Stress[/gold] to deal {BonusDamage:diff()} additional damage.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_SWORD.title: Iron Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_SWORD.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Your next {Echoes:diff()} [gold]Attack[/gold] cards are played an additional time.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ALTER_PATH.title: Another Way
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONE_ARMOR.title: Stone Brick Armor
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONE_ARMOR.descripti:
Gain {Armor:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
At the start of each turn, lose 1 Dexterity.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_POWER_UP.title: Shift, Accelerate, Take Off
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_ZOMBIE.title: "White Zombie"
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CRUSHING_WHEEL.title: Crushing Wheel Array
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CRUSHING_WHEEL.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. This card costs 1 less for each time you spent [gold]Materials[/gold] this turn.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ENMERGENCY_REPAIR.des:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of your next turn, gain 2 [gold]Stress[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LIGHT_ASSAULT.title: Light Assault
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LIGHT_ASSAULT.descrip: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. This card deals 1 less damage for every 2 [gold]Materials[/gold] you have.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EASY_PEASY.title: Easy Peasy
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EASY_PEASY.descriptio:
At the start of each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {EasyPeasy:diff()} {EasyPeasy:plural:card|cards}.
At the start of each turn, add 1 [gold]Dazed[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold] and increase this amount by 1.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ALL_ITEM.title: All-Item Warehouse
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LESS_HOLIDAY.descript: [gold]Choose[/gold] up to {SelectCount:diff()} cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Work Overtime+|Work Overtime}[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WORK_WORK.title: Work Overtime
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ALTERNATOR.title: Alternator
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_NOTHING.title: Bare-Handed Strike
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WOODEN_PICKAXE.title: Wooden Pickaxe
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WOODEN_PICKAXE.descri: At the start of next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WOODEN_ARMOR.title: Wooden Armor
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_NETHERITE_PICKAXE.des: Every time you play 2 cards in a single turn, gain 1 [gold]Plank[/gold], [gold]Cobblestone[/gold], [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold], and [gold]Diamond[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_COBBLESTONE_GENERATOR: At the start of your turn, gain 2 [gold]Cobblestone[/gold] and increase this amount by 2.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SHIELD_ATTACK.title: Shield Bash
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SHIELD_ATTACK.descrip:
Deal damage to ALL enemies equal to {BlockMultiplier:diff()} times your current [gold]Block[/gold].{InCombat:
(Deals {TotalDamage:diff()} damage)|}
Remove all your [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SPINNING_HAND.title: Spinning Hand
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SPINNING_HAND.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
This card costs 1 less for each time you [gold]Craft[/gold] this combat.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PRODUCTION_DOCUMENT.d: Cards you temporarily add during combat gain [gold]Retain[/gold]. At the end of your turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each retained card.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_RECORD_PLAYER.title: Record Player
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MILK.title: Milk
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_VACANT_DOMAIN.title: Vacant Domain
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PRESS_W_TO_THINK.desc:
Choose 1 of 3 cards from the top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to add into your hand.
It gains [gold]Replay[/gold] {Replay:diff()} and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BACKUP_CRAFTING.title: Backup Workbench
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_TRADITIONALIST.title: Traditionalist
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DRIPSTONE_TRAP.title: Dripstone Trap
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DRIPSTONE_TRAP.descri:
Spend ALL [gold]Cobblestone[/gold].
For each spent, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy and apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PRE_PROCESSING.title: Preprocessing
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WORKBENCH_BACKPACK.de:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
[gold]Craft[/gold].
Reduce this card's cost by 1.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_REGROUP.title: Regroup
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_REGROUP.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. Put 1 card from your discard pile into your hand.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_REGROUP_CHOOSE: Choose a card from your discard pile to add to your hand
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CHANGE_EQUIPMENT.desc: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards, then choose {Cards:diff()} cards in your hand to shuffle into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CHANGE_EQUIPMENT_CHOO: Choose {Amount} cards to shuffle into your draw pile
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_ARMOR.title: Diamond Armor
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_ARMOR.descrip:
Gain {Armor:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
If you still have [gold]Plating[/gold] at the end of the turn, retain your [gold]Block[/gold] for this turn.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FOX_BITE.title: Fox Bite
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MAID_SUPPORT.title: Maid's Support
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FORGING.title: Forging
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EQUIVALENT_EXCHANGE.d:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] any card from your hand. Gain resources based on that card's tier.{IfUpgraded:show:
If the exhausted card was Upgraded, double the resources gained.|}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_QUICK_SHELTER.title: Quick Shelter
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BLUEPRINT_PRINTING.de: Spend {Wood:diff()} [gold]Plank[/gold] and {Stone:diff()} [gold]Cobblestone[/gold]. Choose 1 card in your hand; add {Cards:diff()} copies to your hand that cost 1 less and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STRESS_RESPONSE.title: Stress Response
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STRESS_RESPONSE.descr:
Lose 6 HP.
Gain 1 Max HP, {Energy:diff()} Energy, and draw 2 cards.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MASS_PRODUCTION.title: Mass Production
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MASS_PRODUCTION.descr: When you [gold]Craft[/gold] this turn, give ALL allies a copy of the crafted card.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HELL_GIFT.title: Hell's Gift
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HELL_GIFT.description: Add a random [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Upgraded |}[/gold]golden equipment card to your [gold]hand[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GOLDEN_SWORD.title: Golden Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GOLDEN_SWORD.descript: Every 2 [gold]Attack[/gold] cards you play, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}{IfUpgraded:show:|. All [gold]Attack[/gold] cards gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold].}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SNOW_BALL_OVERWHELMIN:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage{IfUpgraded:show: twice|}.
The next [gold]Skill[/gold] you play this turn costs 0.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_PICKAXE.title: Diamond Pickaxe
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_PICKAXE.descr:
Every card you [gold]Craft[/gold] is Upgraded.[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:
Craft.|}[/gold]{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GOLDEN_PICKAXE.title: Golden Pickaxe
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GOLDEN_PICKAXE.descri: Whenever you gain [gold]Materials[/gold], gain that much [gold]Block[/gold] and deal damage to a random enemy equal to {IfUpgraded:show:3|2} times that amount.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BUCKET.title: Bucket
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BUCKET.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of next turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {Weak:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL units.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_NO_MORE_FALCHION.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits} times. Spend 1 [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold] to increase this card's hit count by 1 for this combat.
Return this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STEEL_CHAMBER.title: Steel Chamber
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STEEL_CHAMBER.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits} times. Return this card to your hand.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SHIELD.title: Shield
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SHIELD.description: Choose a character to gain {Dex:diff()} Dexterity this turn.{IfUpgraded:show: You cannot play this card again this turn.| You cannot play this card again this turn or next turn.}{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_AUTO_CRAFTER.title: Auto Crafter
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_AUTO_CRAFTER.descript: At the start of each turn, [gold]Craft[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PAYBACK_TIME.title: Payback Time
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BATCH_CRAFT.title: Batch Craft
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BATCH_CRAFT.descripti:
[gold]Craft[/gold].
Gain [blue]X[/blue]{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} copies of the crafted card.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_KALEIDOSCOPE_POT.desc:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Choose {Transform:diff()} cards in your hand to [gold]Transform[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HAMMER_STRIKE.title: Hammer Slam
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HAMMER_STRIKE.descrip: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. [gold]Strength[/gold] damage bonuses are multiplied by {Multiplier:diff()}. Each turn this card is [gold]Retained[/gold], its cost is reduced by 1.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_QUICK_ATTACK.title: Quick Attack
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_NETHERITE_CHEST_PLATE:
Gain {Plating:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
Double the [gold]Block[/gold] you gain from [gold]Plating[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HIGHLY_FOCUSED.title: Highly Focused
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SWEET_DREAM.title: Sweet Dream
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SWEET_DREAM.descripti: Shuffle ALL cards from your hand into your draw pile, then draw that many cards.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Shuffle a [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your draw pile.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GOLDEN_ARMOR.title: Golden Armor
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GOLDEN_ARMOR.descript:
Gain {Buffer:diff()} [gold]Buffer[/gold] and 1 [gold]Artifact[/gold].
When you lose Buffer, heal HP equal to the damage you would have taken.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_RESTOCK_UPGRADE.title: Refined Backpack: Restock Upgrade
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_RESTOCK_UPGRADE.descr:
Grants your [gold]Sophisticated Backpack[/gold] an extra effect: at the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.
Can only be crafted once.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FEEDING_UPGRADE.title: Refined Backpack: Feeding Upgrade
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FEEDING_UPGRADE.descr:
Grants your [gold]Sophisticated Backpack[/gold] an extra effect: at the start of each turn, gain 1 Regeneration.
Can only be crafted once.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SMELTING_UPGRADE.desc:
Grants your [gold]Sophisticated Backpack[/gold] an extra effect: at the start of each turn, gain 1 [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold].
Can only be crafted once.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CRAFT_UPGRADE.title: Refined Backpack: Crafting Upgrade
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CRAFT_UPGRADE.descrip:
Grants your [gold]Sophisticated Backpack[/gold] an extra effect: every 2 [gold]Craft[/gold](s), you [gold]Craft[/gold] 1 additional time.
Can only be crafted once.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONECUTTER_UPGRADE.d:
Grants your [gold]Sophisticated Backpack[/gold] an extra effect: every 3 turns, your [gold]Cobblestone[/gold] is doubled.
Can only be crafted once.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SAVINGS_UPGRADE.title: Refined Backpack: Savings Upgrade
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SAVINGS_UPGRADE.descr:
Grants your [gold]Sophisticated Backpack[/gold] an extra effect: at the end of combat, gain 15 additional Gold.
Can only be crafted once.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WIND_CRANK.title: Wind Crank
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_REDEMPTION_STRIKE.des: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Heal ALL characters for {Heal:diff()} HP.
If any enemy intends to attack, gain {Dex:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_RECUPERATE.title: Recuperate
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_RECUPERATE.descriptio: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Discard ALL Attack{IfUpgraded:show:, Curse, Quest, and Status|} cards in your hand.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SPIRIT_FOX_FORM.title: Spirit Fox Form
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SPIRIT_FOX_FORM.descr: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], apply {Slow:diff()} [gold]Slow[/gold] to the target.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ARM_TO_TEETH.title: Arm To Teeth
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ARM_TO_TEETH.descript: When you have both [gold]Plating[/gold] and [gold]Strength[/gold], deal double damage.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ESSENCE_RECONSTRUCTIO:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain [gold]Chant[/gold] equal to the number of cards exhausted{IfUpgraded:show:+2|}.
Draw cards equal to your [gold]Chant[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MAGIC_OVERLOADED.desc: Your [gold]Magic[/gold] cards gain an additional {IfUpgraded:show:[blue]75%[/blue]|[blue]50%[/blue]} of [gold]Chant[/gold] effects.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GETTING_WOOD.title: Getting Wood
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GETTING_WOOD.descript: Gain {Wood:diff()} [gold]Plank[/gold]. Deal damage equal to the [gold]Plank[/gold] gained.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SCRATCH.title: Scratch
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MAGIC_MISSILE.title: Magic Missile
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MAGIC_MISSILE.descrip:
Cause an enemy to lose [purple]{Damage:diff()}[/purple] HP 3 times.
Gain {ChantPower:diff()} [gold]Chant[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BARRIER_WAVE.title: Barrier Wave
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BARRIER_WAVE.descript:
ALL enemies lose [purple]{Damage:diff()}[/purple] HP. Gain [purple]{ChantBlock:diff()}[/purple] [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {ChantPower:diff()} [gold]Chant[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_INTERMITTENT_CHANTING:
Gain 1 [gold]Weak[/gold].
Whenever you cause an enemy to lose HP, that enemy gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] and you gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SHARD_COPY.title: Mind Over Matter
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SHARD_COPY.descriptio: Whenever you play a [gold]Magic[/gold] card, gain [gold]Chant 1[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EXPLOSION_MAGIC.title: Explosion Magic
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EXPLOSION_MAGIC.descr:
Apply [purple]{Burn:diff()}[/purple] [gold]Burning[/gold] to ALL enemies {Hits:diff()} times.
Lose 3 [gold]Chant[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EROSION.title: Erosion
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EROSION.description:
Apply [purple]{Stacks:diff()}[/purple] [gold]Disintegration[/gold] to an enemy. ALL enemies with [gold]Disintegration[/gold] lose HP equal to their stacks.
Gain [purple]{ChantPower:diff()}[/purple] [gold]Chant[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MEMORY.title: Memory
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MEMORY.description: At the start of your turn, add a copy of the last [gold]Skill[/gold] you played last turn. It gains [gold]Exhaust[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: and [gold]Retain[/gold]|}.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_OTHERWORLD_CROSSING.d: At the start of each turn, randomly choose a card in your hand. Add a copy of it to your hand with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PETRIFICATION_SPELL.d:
Gain [purple]{Stones:diff()}[/purple] [gold]Cobblestone[/gold]. ALL enemies lose HP equal to the [gold]Cobblestone[/gold] you gained this turn.
Gain [purple]{ChantPower:diff()}[/purple] [gold]Chant[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LAUNCH_PLATFORM.title: Launch Platform
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LAUNCH_PLATFORM.descr: The first time you spend [gold]Stress[/gold] each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PLANNING_EXPERT.title: Planning Expert
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LIBERATION.title: Liberation
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LIBERATION.descriptio: At the end of your turn, play a copy of each [gold]Retained[/gold] card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_NETHERITE_SWORD.title: Netherite Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_NETHERITE_SWORD.descr: {IfUpgraded:show: Upgrade and play|Play} all [gold]Sword[/gold] cards in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HOARDING_HABIT.title: Hoarding Habit
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HOARDING_HABIT.descri: Gain {Wood:diff()} [gold]Plank[/gold] and {Stone:diff()} [gold]Cobblestone[/gold]. At the start of next turn, gain {NextTurnMaterial:diff()} [gold]Plank[/gold] and {NextTurnMaterial:diff()} [gold]Cobblestone[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LOGISTICS.title: Logistics
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LOGISTICS.description: Choose {IfUpgraded:show:any|a} card in your hand and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it. Add a copy of it to a teammate's hand.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LOGISTICS_CHOOSE: Choose a card to exhaust and send
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SWEEP.title: Sweep
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SWEEP.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. If you have no Block, deal damage one additional time.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_OBTAIN_STRESS.title: Obtain Stress
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ETERNAL_MELODY.title: Eternal Melody
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ETERNAL_MELODY.descri: Whenever you play a [gold]Magic[/gold] card, a random enemy loses [blue]2[/blue] Max HP. For every {IfUpgraded:show:[blue]1[/blue]|[blue]2[/blue]} [gold]Chant[/gold], it loses an additional [blue]2[/blue] Max HP.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MANA_SURGE.title: Mana Surge
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_TRIUNE_BLESSING.title: Triune Blessing
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_TRIUNE_BLESSING.descr: All players gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold], [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold], and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Focus[/gold]. Consume up to {MaxConsume:diff()} [gold]Chant[/gold]. For each Chant consumed, gain +1 Strength and +1 Dexterity. For every 2 Chant consumed, gain +1 Focus.
